mapper.select: select log_id, tenant_id, menu_id, status, operate_time, operate_by, reason from hc_customer_menu_status_log where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and menu_id = #{menuId} order by operate_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into hc_customer_menu_status_log (log_id, tenant_id, menu_id, status, operate_time, operate_by, reason) values (#{logId}, #{tenantId}, #{menuId}, #{status}, #{operateTime}, #{operateBy}, #{reason})
